accepted_search_aliases: Lin Dan Lee Chong Wei Beijing final
Lin Dan Lee Chong Wei London final
Chen Long Lee Chong Wei Rio final

prompt_required_summary_fields: watched source video title or URL
canonical_output_schema.clip_filename_guidance: filenames should include year and finalists

timestamp_acceptance_policy.preferred_window_for_full_match_uploads: timestamp should be near the final rally in the deciding game, typically within the last 90 seconds of the upload
timestamp_acceptance_policy.preferred_window_for_highlight_uploads: timestamp should point to the final rally itself or to the start of the final-point clip
reject_if: timestamp clearly points to game 1 or a non-decisive stretch
timestamp is absent for multiple finals

search_cues.timestamp_requirement: Reported timestamps should point to the winning rally in the deciding game or, for straight-games finals, the second game.

full_credit_requires: all pairings and scores are correct
2012 is explicitly treated as a game-3 decider
straight-games finals use game 2 as the last-point target
partial_credit_if: historical facts are correct but one or two timestamps are weak
all 5 years are covered but one clip artifact is missing
reject_if: the output confuses finals with semifinals or bronze-medal matches
the summary drops one of the required Olympic years

common_mistakes: Mixing semifinal clips into the final-point set.
For 2012, using the last point of game 2 instead of the deciding third game.
Confusing Tokyo 2020 with calendar year 2021 in a way that drops the correct Olympic edition.
authoring_note: Historical pairing and score facts are fixed. Video source URLs remain dynamic, so hidden evaluation should be strict on the match facts, the deciding-game logic, and the timestamp semantics rather than on one particular upload.
